purpose: REST/OData API catalog for the Global HR metadata-first platform, mapping Dataverse entities, source tables, data products, security, filters, payloads, relationships, and integration patterns.

api_style.primary_style: REST / OData v4 compatible with Microsoft Dataverse Web API
api_style.auth: OAuth2 bearer token issued by Microsoft Entra ID
api_style.write_pattern: POST for create, PATCH against alternate key for upsert, DELETE only for admin-controlled scenarios
api_style.batch_pattern: Use /api/data/v9.2/$batch for high-volume loads and relationship updates

summary.security_model: OAuth2 + Dataverse security roles + department/domain authorization + field-level security for restricted fields

global_error_model.400: Bad Request - invalid filter, payload, or data type.
global_error_model.401: Unauthorized - missing or expired bearer token.
global_error_model.403: Forbidden - user/service principal lacks table, row, or field privilege.
global_error_model.404: Not Found - endpoint, record, or alternate key not found.
global_error_model.409: Conflict - duplicate alternate key or concurrency conflict.
global_error_model.429: Too Many Requests - throttling; use retry-after and batching strategy.
global_error_model.500: Server Error - retry with correlation ID and escalate if persistent.

global_security_controls.token_scope: Dataverse user_impersonation or application permissions as configured in environment.
global_security_controls.least_privilege: Grant read/write only to the data products and tables required by department role.
global_security_controls.field_security: Required for PII, person identifiers, compensation, payroll, and audit columns.
global_security_controls.external_sharing: Only anonymized/demo data may be shared externally.
global_security_controls.auditability: All write operations should capture service principal, timestamp, request correlation ID, and source system.

soap_compatibility_notes.status: Reference only; this catalog is REST-first.
soap_compatibility_notes.use_case: Useful when explaining Workday/SAP legacy integration patterns where XML/SOAP payloads are transformed into REST/OData-compatible JSON payloads.
soap_compatibility_notes.mapping_pattern: SOAP XML envelope -> canonical JSON -> Dataverse/OData endpoint -> Power BI semantic model

GET_by_alternate_key.purpose: Retrieve one absence_plans record by alternate key.

PATCH_upsert.purpose: Update or upsert a absence_plans record by alternate key.

DELETE.purpose: Delete record. Recommended for admin/service accounts only; soft-delete or deactivate preferred for HR data.

security.authorization_model: Dataverse security roles + team-based domain access + field security for restricted fields
